---
title: "Welcome to My Visual Analytics Journey"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "hands-on_ex/**/*.qmd"
    - "take-home_ex/**/*.qmd"
    - "in-class_ex/**/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 6
---

Welcome to **ISSS08 Visual Analytics and Applications**. In this website, you will find my coursework prepared for this course.
